summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Fatin Penhores Pawn System. 33/33 pytest backend tests passed covering auth (JWT httpOnly cookies, login/logout/refresh/me), users (admin-only, self-delete block, staff RBAC), clients CRUD, separate items collections (car/motorcycle/electronic), contracts (auto CTR-YYYY-#### number, item-pawned linkage), payments (partial→full triggers redeemed + item release), contract & receipt PDF generation (verified %PDF magic bytes + content-type), full auction flow (overdue → move → public list → sold), all 6 reports + dashboard summary, and public endpoints (auction-items, warehouse, contact). Frontend: public pages render (Home/Auction/Warehouse/About/Contact), language toggle EN↔PT works (sidebar translates to Klientes/Sasán Penhór/Kontratu/etc.), admin login redirects to /dashboard, all KPI cards populated, every admin route loads without errors, every required data-testid present (client form full-name/id-type/id-number/phone/address/municipality/posto/suco/aldeia/notes/save; items-tab-car/motorcycle/electronic; report-type/report-export-csv; user-new-btn; contract-new-btn; payment-new-btn), logout clears session and routes to /login.

issues: Browser tab title shows generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Fatin Penhores' branding — update public/index.html <title>.

AuthContext calls GET /api/auth/me on every public page load when unauthenticated, generating 401 console noise. Consider gating the call to admin routes only or swallowing the 401 silently in AuthContext.

action_items: Optional polish: silence 401 console errors from AuthContext on public routes (only call /api/auth/me on admin routes or after explicit login).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 855 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, clients_router.py, items_router.py, contracts_router.py, auctions_router.py, reports_router.py) for maintainability.
_recompute_contract_status is called for every contract on every GET /api/contracts list call — O(N) DB writes when statuses change. Acceptable for current scale but watch as contracts grow.
CarIn and MotorcycleIn are identical Pydantic models — could be unified with a shared base while still using separate collections.
auctions/public endpoint duplicates logic with /api/public/auction-items — consider consolidating to a single response shape.
test_credentials: admin@fatinpenhores.tl / admin123 (verified working). Backend seeds admin on startup and updates password if env mismatch.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates and tears down its own TEST_ prefixed data (clients, items, contracts, auctions, contact messages). One redeemed contract may remain from contract-flow class for dashboard verification — cleanup is best-effort.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression baseline (33 tests, all passing). Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Verified flows: auth (httpOnly cookies present after login, both access_token and refresh_token), users RBAC (staff blocked from /api/users 403, self-delete 400), separate item collections (cars/motorcycles/electronics), contract auto-numbering CTR-2026-0001, PDF magic bytes %PDF on /contracts/{id}/pdf and /payments/{id}/pdf, overdue→auction→sold workflow, public contact form, all 6 report types, language toggle (PT translations confirmed). All required data-testid attributes verified in DOM. No critical bugs found.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs requiring root cause analysis.
